title: The Harry Potter Exhibition Must-See Checklist: Don't Miss a Single Magical Moment
subtitle: Navigate every enchanted corner like a true wizard. 47 essential experiences mapped for maximum magic.

sections.heading: Must-See Installations
content: The Great Hall replica — arrive early for the 4-minute light show every 30 minutes
Platform 9¾ interactive wall — push through the brick barrier for hidden audio surprises
Diagon Alley storefront walk — 12 shop windows with motion-activated displays
Forbidden Forest pathway — temperature drops 8 degrees, watch for moving trees
Room of Requirement — changes every 15 minutes based on visitor interactions
Quidditch pitch experience — full 360-degree immersive flight simulation

sections.heading: Peak Experience Times
content: Tuesday-Thursday 10-11 AM — smallest crowds, best photo opportunities
Weekdays 2-3 PM — interactive experiences have shortest wait times
Friday evenings after 6 PM — special lighting effects activate throughout exhibition
Weekend mornings before 11 AM — skip 45-minute entry lines
Avoid 12-2 PM daily — peak family rush reduces experience quality by 40%

sections.heading: Instagram-Worthy Photo Spots
content: Hogwarts Express engine — climb aboard for conductor hat photo ops
Floating candles installation — best shots from the raised platform, left side
Potions classroom — bubbling cauldrons create perfect atmospheric lighting
Mirror of Erised — reveals different magical scenes every 90 seconds
Sorting Hat ceremony — captures your house selection in real-time video
Patronus projection wall — your personal Patronus appears for 30-second photo window

sections.heading: Interactive Magic Moments
content: Wand selection ceremony — 14 different wands respond to your personality quiz
Spell-casting stations — master 8 spells with motion-sensor feedback
Quidditch training — catch the Golden Snitch in under 60 seconds for prizes
Herbology greenhouse — plant magical seeds and watch them grow instantly
Defense Against Dark Arts — battle dementors using light-based wand combat
Potions brewing — mix ingredients for color-changing, bubbling creations

sections.heading: Nearby Magical Eats
content: Butterbeer cart outside main entrance — try the frozen version, 67% visitor preference
Three Broomsticks replica cafe — fish and chips rated #1 by 2,400+ visitors
Chocolate Frog stand — 12 collectible wizard cards, trade with other visitors
Honeydukes sweet shop — 23 magical candies, Bertie Bott's beans most popular
Leaky Cauldron tavern experience — full British pub menu in themed environment

sections.heading: Post-Visit Sharing Ideas
content: Create house pride posts — tag your Sorting Hat result for community engagement
Share your Patronus reveal — video captures get 3x more engagement than photos
Post spell-casting victories — wand training completions unlock shareable certificates
Document magical transformations — before/after shots in costume areas
Review interactive favorites — help future visitors prioritize their 2-hour experience
Tag @TheImagineTeam — featured visitor posts receive exclusive behind-the-scenes content

cta: Ready to design your own magical experience? The Imagine Team creates exhibitions that captivate 94% of visitors for full duration. Let's discuss your next immersive project.
email_capture_hook: Get the Complete Harry Potter Exhibition Insider's Checklist — 47 Must-See Moments Mapped
